Video.summary: Mufasa, a South African boerboel, became aggressive after being pinned down by another dog; Tucker, a teacup poodle's behavior became more aggressive.
Video.title: Rockin' the Boat

Video.summary: Aggressive bulldog Hugo is sent to canine rehab; Crusty must overcome his dominance issues if he's ever going to enjoy walks.
Video.title: Bull-Whipped

Video.summary: A Dogo Argentino with canine aggression; a terrier/corgi mix who becomes aggressive when faced with traveling.
Video.title: Warrior Dog

Video.summary: A dog trained to sniff out contraband cell phones in prisons is unable to do his job due to his skittish nature; a dog is terrified of hot air balloons.
Video.title: K-9 Behind Bars

Video.summary: Two Jack Russell terriers, Ruby and Jinx, show how dogs communicate through energy and body language.
Video.title: Why Dogs Fight

Video.summary: Stella is a bulldog mascot for a dog-friendly café; a German shepherd who barks too loud, and two aggressive miniature pinschers.
Video.title: Mascot Mayhem

Video.summary: Cesar helps comedians Skyler Stone, Ralphie May and Paul Rodriguez get to grips with their unruly hounds.
Video.title: Bad Dogs of Comedy

Video.summary: Cesar meets NASCAR driver Kevin Harvick to help with his snappy Chihuahua and an aggressive Pekingese called Gizmo.
Video.title: Daytona Dogs

Video.summary: Cesar helps dogs overcome their fears including a whippet mix who is blind and deaf, a labradoodle that fears the ocean, and a cocker spaniel that fears all humans.
Video.title: Fear Factor

Video.summary: A dog with an abusive past fears men; a Border Collie mix refuses to leave his chair and is afraid of leashes.
Video.title: Killer in the Window

Video.summary: Playboy Playmates, Miss February 2010 is having trouble with her Chihuahua, while Orange County, Miss September 2011 with her terrier pug mix.
Video.title: Playboy Playmates

Video.summary: Cesar helps fitness guru Jillian Michaels with her aggressive Chihuahua, while "Frasier" star Kelsey Grammer needs help house-training his dogs.
Video.title: Hollywood Hounds

Video.summary: A couple with three unruly dogs, one with aggression issues; a poodle who fears the back door since running into the screen door; a Weimaraner who is territorial and aggressive.
Video.title: Closet Cases

Video.summary: Harry goes crazy at anything on wheels; shadows drive Brooks crazy.
Video.title: Harry and Brooks

Video.summary: Chihuahua is a pint-sized peril to its owner's roommate; slobbering Great Dane afraid of shiny floors.
Video.title: Nunu and Kane

Video.summary: Two wolf hybrids with aggression issues; an aggressive Chihuahua.
Video.title: Born to Be Wild

Video.summary: Josh, a Maltese-poodle mix, won't let anyone go near him with a brush; Boomer, a clownish dog, must always be the center of attention.
Video.title: Josh and Boomer

Video.summary: Churchill is usually a well-mannered dog, but around other animals he's a monster, and lovable pit bull Maya can be a handful.
Video.title: Churchill and Maya

Video.summary: Ava, a small mixed-breed spins constantly; Gus, a large dog who greets people by throwing its body at them.
Video.title: Gus and Ava

Video.summary: A Great Dane behaves aggressively toward strange dogs; a Lhasa Apso eats everything she can get her paws on.
Video.title: Secrets and Lies

Video.summary: Emily, the pit bull, is sent to doggie boot camp because she is so quick to attack other dogs that her owners can no longer walk her.
Video.title: Emily

Video.summary: Holly, a Labrador puppy, displays severe food aggression; a women's shelter will take a needy woman and her pit bull, Tucker, but Cesar must help the dog become less protective first.
Video.title: Cesar's Worst Bite

Video.summary: Cesar takes the spoiled Bubba down a notch; discover why German shepherd Garret never stops chasing his tail.
Video.title: Bubba and Garrett

Video.summary: An aggressive sheepdog/collie mix needs extra attention, so Cesar brings him to the Dog Psychology Center; a St. Bernard with a fear of stairs.
Video.title: Terrible Tobi

Video.summary: Cesar tries to help Slick a fear-ridden dog who was rescued after living in a crate for 15 hours a day and Pepper, another rescue dog with issues.
Video.title: Slick & Pepper

Video.summary: A Chihuahua mix with aggression issues; a Pomeranian with severe separation anxiety; an Aussie/Shar Pei mix who runs away when his owner coughs.
Video.title: Nail in the Coughin

Video.summary: A charmer around people, Opie becomes aggressive around other dogs; Flirt the Chinese Crested is hyper and neurotic.
Video.title: Flirt and Opie

Video.summary: Cesar tries to help a boxer named Coach before he is put down for biting someone; Sueki turns her nose up at leads.
Video.title: Sueki and Coach

Video.summary: A vizsla with a biting problem is afraid of everything; a Shetland sheepdog barks at household appliances.
Video.title: Ruby and Rana

Video.summary: A rescued mastiff likes to chew everything and barks incessantly; Paris is a temperamental, long-haired Chihuahua.
Video.title: Hank and Paris
